TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Josh Akognon == Josh Akognon hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1986, ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 2, Josh Akognon, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Josh Akognon ga, la'iy ni Tony Bennett. pinqbaqan nya Josh Akognon, t'aring kawas tay 2004 tehuk kawas tay 2006, mqwas biru sa Washington State pqwsan biru krahu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == *os~ɕħ akoɣnon == *os~ɕħ akoɣnon ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ taj s~ɕuruw. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *os~ɕħ akoɣnon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja *os~ɕħ akoɣnon ɣa, laʔij ni tonj βennett. pinqβaqan nja *os~ɕħ akoɣnon, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa was~ɕħiŋton s~ɕtate pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: == Josh Akognon == Josh Akognon hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1986, ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 2, Josh Akognon, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Josh Akognon ga, la'iy ni Tony Bennett. pinqbaqan nya Josh Akognon, t'aring kawas tay 2004 tehuk kawas tay 2006, mqwas biru sa Washington State pqwsan biru krahu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == *os~ɕħ akoɣnon == *os~ɕħ akoɣnon ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ taj s~ɕuruw. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *os~ɕħ akoɣnon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja *os~ɕħ akoɣnon ɣa, laʔij ni tonj βennett. pinqβaqan nja *os~ɕħ akoɣnon, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa was~ɕħiŋton s~ɕtate pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
